query: what editor theme does the user prefer
seed_content: The user prefers dark mode in all editors and terminals
expected_top_content: The user prefers dark mode in all editors

query: which database was chosen for the project
seed_content: We decided to use PostgreSQL with pgvector for semantic search because it supports both relational queries and vector similarity in one database
expected_top_content: We decided to use PostgreSQL with pgvector

seed_content: Code style: use 4-space indentation, snake_case for functions, PascalCase for types. Always add doc comments on pub items.

query: what language is the memory server written in
seed_content: The memory server is implemented in Rust using the 2021 edition with Tokio for async runtime
expected_top_content: The memory server is implemented in Rust

query: which package manager should be used for Node.js
seed_content: Use pnpm for all Node.js projects in this workspace — not npm or yarn
expected_top_content: Use pnpm for all Node.js projects

query: how are integration tests isolated from each other
seed_content: Integration tests use sqlx::test for ephemeral per-test databases — no shared state between tests
expected_top_content: Integration tests use sqlx::test for ephemeral

query: what embedding model dimensions are configured
seed_content: fastembed All-MiniLM-L6-v2 is the default local embedding model — 384 dimensions, cached at ~/Library/Caches/memcp/models/
expected_top_content: fastembed All-MiniLM-L6-v2 is the default local embedding model

query: what web framework is used for the Python API server
seed_content: The Python API server uses FastAPI with uvicorn, serving HTTP endpoints on port 8080
expected_top_content: The Python API server uses FastAPI

query: user color scheme preference for development tools
seed_content: Always use the Catppuccin Mocha color scheme in all terminals and IDE configurations
expected_top_content: Always use the Catppuccin Mocha color scheme
